title: psychotria polymorpha
intro: Psychotria polymorpha, also known as Wild Coffee or Forest Coffee, is a tropical plant species native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a stimulant and anti-inflammatory agent, due to its high caffeine content and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Wild Coffee include its ability to improve cognitive function, boost energy, and aid in weight loss, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine in various forms, including a coffee substitute made by infusing the leaves in hot water.
